meaning: बिजली का मुख्य बोर्ड जहाँ से स्विच कंट्रोल होते हैं
definition: A metal box containing switches that control the electricity flowing to different parts of a building.
example: In case of an electrical fire, shut off the power at the breaker panel.

meaning: टक्कर (विशेषकर वाहनों की)
definition: An instance of one moving object striking violently against another, such as a car crash.
example: The collision on the highway caused a major traffic jam.

meaning: ज्वलनशील (जो आसानी से आग पकड़ ले)
definition: Able to catch fire and burn easily, though less easily than flammable materials.
example: Wood and coal are combustible materials used for heating homes.

meaning: प्रदूषण या दूषित होना
definition: The presence of an unwanted substance in an environment that makes it impure or unsafe.
example: The local authorities warned residents about water contamination after the flood.

meaning: गलाने या नष्ट करने वाला (जैसे तेज़ाब)
definition: A substance that can burn or wear away skin, metal, or other materials through chemical action.
example: Acid is a corrosive liquid that must be handled with extreme care.

meaning: आपातकालीन निकास या बाहर निकलने का रास्ता
definition: A special door or passage used to leave a building quickly in case of danger.
example: Always keep the emergency exit clear of boxes and chairs.

meaning: खतरे की जगह से सुरक्षित स्थान पर जाना
definition: The act of moving people away from a dangerous place to a safer location.
example: The police ordered an immediate evacuation of the building when the fire alarm rang.

meaning: आँखें धोने की जगह (आपात स्थिति के लिए)
definition: A device designed to flush chemicals or dirt out of a person's eyes with water.
example: If a chemical splashes in your eyes, run to the eyewash station immediately.

meaning: आग बुझाने का यंत्र (अग्निशामक)
definition: A portable device that discharges water, foam, gas, or other substances to put out a fire.
example: She grabbed the fire extinguisher from the wall to put out the kitchen fire.

meaning: प्राथमिक चिकित्सा बॉक्स
definition: A box or bag containing bandages, medicines, and basic medical supplies for emergency treatment.
example: We keep a first-aid kit in the car in case of minor accidents during road trips.

meaning: अति ज्वलनशील (जो तुरंत आग पकड़ ले)
definition: Easily set on fire and capable of burning rapidly.
example: Keep paper and cardboard away from the heater because they are highly flammable.

meaning: टॉर्च या हाथ की बत्ती
definition: A small battery-operated portable electric light.
example: Keep a flashlight in your bedside drawer in case there is a power outage.

meaning: खतरा या जोखिम
definition: A danger or risk that could cause harm or accidents.
example: Wet floors are a slipping hazard, so we must put up warning signs.

meaning: खतरनाक या हानिकारक
definition: Risky, dangerous, or unsafe to health or environment.
example: Disposing of hazardous waste in regular trash cans is illegal.

meaning: पानी में डूबने से बचाने वाली जैकेट
definition: A sleeveless jacket made of buoyant material, designed to keep a person afloat in water.
example: The boat captain required all passengers to wear a life jacket.

meaning: आपात स्थिति में इकट्ठा होने की जगह
definition: A designated place where people gather in the event of an emergency evacuation.
example: Once the fire alarm sounds, walk calmly to the muster point in the parking lot.

meaning: व्यक्तिगत सुरक्षा उपकरण (जैसे मास्क, दस्ताने)
definition: Abbreviation for Personal Protective Equipment, such as masks, gloves, and safety helmets.
example: Doctors wore full PPE to avoid catching the contagious virus.

meaning: एहतियात या बचाव के उपाय
definition: A measure taken in advance to prevent something dangerous or unpleasant from happening.
example: As a precaution, we wore helmets and safety goggles before entering the construction site.

meaning: जोखिम का मूल्यांकन करना
definition: The systematic identification and evaluation of potential risks that could affect an objective or project.
example: The company conducted a risk assessment before starting the heavy machinery.

meaning: सुरक्षा के लिए पहने जाने वाले उपकरण
definition: Protective clothing or equipment designed to protect the body from injury or infection.
example: You must wear proper safety gear, including steel-toed boots, while working in the warehouse.

meaning: ऊंचाई पर काम करते समय गिरने से बचाने वाली बेल्ट
definition: A system of straps that prevents a person from falling, used when working at high heights.
example: The window cleaner wore a safety harness attached to the roof.

meaning: पाड़ या मचान (निर्माण कार्य के लिए अस्थायी ढांचा)
definition: A temporary metal structure used to support workers while building or repairing a house.
example: Workers must wear safety harnesses when climbing on the high scaffolding.

meaning: सीट बेल्ट (गाड़ी में सुरक्षा के लिए बांधी जाने वाली पट्टी)
definition: A belt that secures a passenger in a vehicle to prevent injury during a collision.
example: Wearing a seatbelt reduces the risk of injury in a car crash.

meaning: आश्रय या सुरक्षित स्थान
definition: A place giving temporary protection from bad weather or danger.
example: The school hall served as an emergency shelter for families who lost their homes.

meaning: शॉर्ट सर्किट (बिजली के तारों का गलत तरीके से जुड़ना)
definition: An accidental electrical connection that interrupts the normal flow of current, often causing sparks or fire.
example: A short circuit in the old wiring started a fire in the basement.

meaning: फिसलन भरा
definition: Having a wet or smooth surface that is difficult to stand or walk on without falling.
example: The road was slippery after the first winter frost.

meaning: धुएं का पता लगाने वाला उपकरण
definition: A device that makes a loud alarm sound when it senses smoke.
example: Test your smoke detector every month to ensure the batteries are working.

meaning: छलकना या गिर जाना (विशेषकर तरल पदार्थ)
definition: An accidental flow of liquid over the edge of its container.
example: The lab assistant cleaned up the chemical spill using a special absorption pad.

meaning: ज़हरीला
definition: Poisonous or harmful to living things if swallowed, inhaled, or touched.
example: The cleaners wore gloves and masks to avoid inhaling the toxic chemicals.

meaning: जलरोधक (जिसमें पानी अंदर न जा सके)
definition: Resisting the penetration of water, keeping things dry.
example: Put your important documents in a waterproof bag during a flood warning.
